title: ReferenceCapability
description: L1 — A curated reference business capability: the hand-authored, versioned spine of the business-architecture model (level 1 = enterprise domain, level 2 = capability), grounded in a reference framework (BIZBOK / APQC / TOGAF). Distinct from the extracted BusinessCapability: this is authored reference structure, not source-evidenced assertion. Raw capabilities are mapped into it via CapabilityClassification; the Business-Architecture Lens projects the tree over both (ADR-0009).

level.description: Curated spine level: 1 = enterprise domain, 2 = capability. The spine is L1+L2 only; L3 functions and L4 activities are classified raw capabilities, not reference nodes.

parent.description: Parent ReferenceCapability (name or id); an L2 capability references its L1 domain. Absent for L1 domains.

framework.description: Reference framework this curated node derives from (its provenance).
